up_to_3_issues: SURFACE_SOURCE_HASH currently captures declared source identity rather than pinned upstream file bytes; acceptable for low-risk surface identity but future version can pin file hashes.
QualityGateContextMissing is explicitly surfaced as WATCH, not PASS; operators can distinguish it via warning_failures.
QG/Schema covers malformed/wrong-version reports; future v2 migration can split QG/SchemaVersion.
